stemHtml: During cruise, the pilots receive an ACAS Traffic Advisory from an aircraft flying at a lower altitude, climbing towards their altitude. According to the ICAO Doc. 8168, they should…

options.a: Advise ATC and initiate an avoiding manoeuvre, unless doing so would jeopardise the safety of the aircraft.
options.b: Use all available information to prepare for appropriate action if a Resolution Advisory occurs.
options.c: Initiate an avoiding manoeuvre if you visually acquire the other traffic.
options.d: Initiate an avoiding manoeuvre based on this Traffic Advisory.
